name: TextReveal
description: Word-by-word, line-by-line, or character-by-character opacity reveal driven by scroll position. Creates a progressive reading effect as the user scrolls.

text.description: The text to progressively reveal on scroll

splitBy.description: How to split the text for staggered reveal

slots.name: text
slots.description: The text content split and revealed progressively via the text prop

layout.description: Renders as a block div. Give it enough vertical height (e.g., min-h-screen) for the scroll effect to have room to progress.

aiPromptHint: Use TextReveal for long-form text that progressively reveals as user scrolls. Split by 'word' for paragraph reveals, 'character' for dramatic single-word reveals, 'line' for section headings. Give the container enough height (min-h-[200vh]) for the scroll range to work well.

examples.title: Word-by-word paragraph reveal
Paragraph with muted base opacity
examples.code:
<TextReveal
  text="Every pixel matters. Every interaction counts. Every moment is an opportunity to delight your users."
  className="text-2xl text-neutral-300 leading-loose max-w-2xl"
/>
